name: Mini Cherry Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine crumbs and butter. Press gently into the bottom of 12 paper-lined muffin cups.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, vanilla, lemon juice, sugar, and egg; beat until smooth.
3. Spoon the mixture into the crusts.
4. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until set. Cool completely.
5. Drain cherries, reserving 1/2 cup juice in a saucepan; discard remaining juice.
6. To prepare topping, add cherries, sugar, cornstarch, and food coloring (if desired) to the saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally; boil for 1 minute.
7. Cool the cherry mixture. Spoon over cheesecakes.
8. Chill for at least 2 hours.
